name: QA 1151
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1151

Exercise the BCC PMDA USDT JVM threads module - install, remove and values.



Copyright (c) 2018-2019 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce

Copyright (c) 2018-2019 Red Hat.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce
